description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped wooden deck with a worn, colorful graphic on the underside, dominated by shades of green and blue. The deck is mounted with two silver metal trucks, each holding a pair of off-white polyurethane wheels that show signs of use. The trucks are attached with visible black hardware, and the wheels are classic street style, suitable for urban environments. The deck's underside displays a large, stylized blue hand graphic, partially faded from wear, set against a distressed white and green background. No visible brand logo is present, but the deck's artwork is distinctive and eye-catching. The grip tape on the top is not visible in these views, but the overall construction suggests a typical street skateboard setup.
description: A well-used skateboard with a colorful, worn graphic of a blue hand on the underside, silver trucks, and off-white street wheels. The deck shows signs of wear, giving it an authentic urban look.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full deck graphic, trucks, and all four wheels, with the blue hand artwork clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skateboard's profile, wheel alignment, and the curvature of the deck's nose and tail.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view similar to view 0, emphasizing the deck's underside graphic and the arrangement of trucks and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the deck's profile, wheel placement, and the continuation of the graphic design.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a large, stylized blue hand graphic with extended fingers, set against a distressed white and green background. The artwork is bold and urban, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, off-white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver trucks with black hardware, traditional kingpin, no visible branding
